description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Distribution Requirement Primitive requires Agents to periodically buy and distribute 0.25% of their token supply per year. The annual requirement of 0.25% of the token supply is divided into twelve (12) equal monthly distributions. Distributions must occur on the first day of each month, with tokens purchased by the Prime Agent on the open market and transferred to an address designated by Sky Core in [A.2.
Prime Agents choose between fulfilling either the Distribution Requirement Primitive or the Market Cap Fee Primitive.

The Distribution Requirement Primitive requires Agents to periodically buy and distribute 0.25% of their token supply per year. The annual requirement of 0.25% of the token supply is divided into twelve (12) equal monthly distributions. Distributions must occur on the first day of each month, with tokens purchased by the Prime Agent on the open market and transferred to an address designated by Sky Core in [A.2.2.6.1.1 - Sky Core-Designated Address](3b05c60a-4f95-4dd8-bfaf-409a9f39ee9f).
Prime Agents choose between fulfilling either the Distribution Requirement Primitive or the Market Cap Fee Primitive.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

summary: Collapse Ecosystem Upkeep To Uniform 50 bps
description: Replaces the Market Cap Fee and Distribution Requirement Primitives with a single Ecosystem Upkeep Fee Primitive at a uniform 50 bps of market capitalization in USDS, and removes the Ecosystem Accord's special upkeep logic.
